testcase.name: test_samsung_devices_25

failure.message: AssertionError: expected 25 samsung phones per iter-3 spec, got 33 assert 33 == 25 + where 33 = len([{'id': 'dev-s24u', 'brand_id': 'brand-samsung', 'enabled': True, 'name': 'Galaxy S24 Ultra', ...}, {'id': 'dev-sgs24u', 'brand_id': 'brand-samsung', 'enabled': True, 'name': 'Galaxy S24 Ultra', ...}, {'id': 'dev-s24p', 'brand_id': 'brand-samsung', 'enabled': True, 'name': 'Galaxy S24+', ...}, {'id': 'dev-sgs24p', 'brand_id': 'brand-samsung', 'enabled': True, 'name': 'Galaxy S24+', ...}, {'id': 'dev-s24', 'brand_id': 'brand-samsung', 'enabled': True, 'name': 'Galaxy S24', ...}, {'id': 'dev-sgs24', 'brand_id': 'brand-samsung', 'enabled': True, 'name': 'Galaxy S24', ...}, ...])

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration3.py:68: in test_samsung_devices_25 assert len(devs) == 25, f"expected 25 samsung phones per iter-3 spec, got {len(devs)}" E AssertionError: expected 25 samsung phones per iter-3 spec, got 33 E assert 33 == 25 E + where 33 = len([{'id': 'dev-s24u', 'brand_id': 'brand-samsung', 'enabled': True, 'name': 'Galaxy S24 Ultra', ...}, {'id': 'dev-sgs24u', 'brand_id': 'brand-samsung', 'enabled': True, 'name': 'Galaxy S24 Ultra', ...}, {'id': 'dev-s24p', 'brand_id': 'brand-samsung', 'enabled': True, 'name': 'Galaxy S24+', ...}, {'id': 'dev-sgs24p', 'brand_id': 'brand-samsung', 'enabled': True, 'name': 'Galaxy S24+', ...}, {'id': 'dev-s24', 'brand_id': 'brand-samsung', 'enabled': True, 'name': 'Galaxy S24', ...}, {'id': 'dev-sgs24', 'brand_id': 'brand-samsung', 'enabled': True, 'name': 'Galaxy S24', ...}, ...])
